message:
Dear Sales Team,

I trust this message finds you well.

On behalf of Tyson Foods, I am reaching out to initiate procurement discussions for the supply of products to support operations across several of our office locations within the United States.

The scope of this project includes the sourcing and supply of the following item:

• Vegetable or Soybean Cooking Oil 35LB
• Whole milk powder 50 lbs
• Tomato Paste

Given that this initiative spans multiple Tyson Foods office locations nationwide, we are particularly interested in suppliers who can demonstrate:

• Consistent product availability and scalable supply capacity
• Competitive volume pricing structures
• Reliable product quality and shelf-life standards
• Efficient nationwide distribution capabilities

Kindly provide your company profile, detailed product specifications (including brand, packaging format, origin, and shelf life), standard lead times, and a formal quotation reflecting volume considerations where applicable.

Upon internal review of your proposal, our procurement team will revert with next steps, including vendor qualification and potential issuance of a purchase order.

We look forward to evaluating your proposal and exploring a mutually beneficial partnership.

message:
Please connect me to the Shipping manager. My name is Leo, and I’m a freight broker working with a strong network of reliable carriers across the US.With 6 year old MC, I wanted to check if you have any upcoming port drayage or OTR shipments that need coverage.
We handle:

Port drayage (import & export)

OTR dry van / reefer / flatbed

Professional drivers and on-time pickups

If you have any lanes or spot loads available, I’d be happy to quote and support you right away.

message:
Dear Sales Team / Manager,

My name is Victor Machado, and I serve as the Chief Financial Officer at JBS USA Food Company. In addition to overseeing financial operations, I am responsible for procurement strategy and supplier partnerships across our U.S. operations.

We are currently expanding our supplier network and are interested in establishing a long-term procurement relationship for fresh red tomatoes. Please find our detailed requirements below:

1. Required Quantity

Full Truckload (FTL) per shipment
Estimated volume: 20–25 metric tons per shipment, depending on your capacity
Frequency: Monthly and ongoing (long-term contract basis)

2. Product Specifications (Fresh Red Tomatoes)

Product: Fresh Red Tomatoes
Size/Dimensions:
Medium to large size
Diameter: 60 mm – 80 mm
Weight:
Average weight: 120g – 180g per tomato
Maturity:
Mature green to breaker stage (suitable for transport and controlled ripening)
Quality Requirements:
Firm, well-shaped, and uniform
Clean and free from soil or foreign matter
Free from cracks, bruising, decay, or pest damage
Uniform color (red or turning stage depending on harvest timing)

3. Packaging Requirements

Standard industry packaging (no customized packaging required)
Acceptable formats: 10kg or 20kg ventilated cartons or crates
Packaging must allow proper airflow and preserve product quality during transit

4. End Use

The product will be utilized for food processing and large-scale distribution, serving both domestic and international markets.

5. Delivery Location

Warehouse Facility
3810 Ironwood Pl
Hyattsville, MD 20785
United States

Delivery to be conducted strictly under Delivered Duty Paid (DDP) terms, with all costs included up to final delivery at our warehouse.

6. Pricing Request

Please provide your most competitive quotation per metric ton, including:

DDP pricing (all-inclusive, covering transportation and delivery to our warehouse)
Any long-term contract pricing advantages
Applicable bulk purchase or volume discounts based on full truckload and recurring monthly orders

7. Alternative Options

If the above specifications are not fully available, we are open to reviewing equivalent alternatives or recommendations that meet similar quality and commercial standards.

8. Payment Terms

We are interested in establishing a credit account under Net 30 or Net 60 days from receipt of goods.

9. Delivery Timeline

Please indicate the estimated delivery timeline from your location to our warehouse in Maryland.

10. Contact & Next Steps

Kindly respond via email with your quotation and supporting details. We look forward to reviewing your proposal, including product specifications, availability, and shipping details. Our objective is to build a reliable, long-term partnership with consistent monthly procurement.

Please also advise on any documentation required from our end to facilitate and formalize this collaboration. We are prepared to provide all necessary information promptly to ensure a smooth onboarding process.

We look forward to establishing a mutually beneficial, long-term business relationship with your company.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
